---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for SwarmCracker
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Describe the use case, not the solution.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your idea. If you have a specific implementation in mind, share it. If not, that's fine — describe the behavior you'd expect.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about, and why they're not ideal.

## Scope

- [ ] Core (executor, translator, lifecycle)
- [ ] Networking (TAP, bridge, VXLAN)
- [ ] Storage / Volumes
- [ ] CLI (swarmcracker, swarmd-firecracker)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure (Ansible, deployment)

## Additional Context

Drawings, references to similar tools, links to relevant issues or PRs.
